    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html lang="zh-CN">
    <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=5.0">
    <meta name="description" content="药's话 Pills Talk — AI 用药安全助手，帮老人读懂药盒上的那行字。TRAE AI 创造力大赛参赛作品。">
    <meta name="theme-color" content="#e8785a">
    <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
    <title>药's话 — 让每盒药都有人解释</title>
    <style>
    * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; }
    :root {
    /* Warm color palette */
    --warm-bg: #fef7f0;
    --warm-bg-soft: #fdf2e9;
    --warm-card: #ffffff;
    --warm-card-glass: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.72);
    --warm-accent: #e8785a;
    --warm-accent-deep: #d45a3a;
    --warm-accent-light: #fde8e0;
    --warm-accent-glow: rgba(232, 120, 90, 0.25);
    --coral: #ff8a65;
    --amber: #f4a261;
    --text-primary: #2d2420;
    --text-secondary: #7a6e65;
    --text-light: #a89e95;
    --success: #5a9e6f;
    --success-bg: #e8f5ee;
    --warning: #d4a843;
    --warning-bg: #fff8e5;
    --danger: #c95d4e;
    --danger-bg: #fde8e5;
    --info: #5a9ec9;
    --info-bg: #e6f2fa;
    --border: #f0e8e0;
    --border-soft: #f7f0e8;
    --shadow-sm: 0 2px 8px rgba(180, 120, 90, 0.06);
    --shadow: 0 8px 28px rgba(180, 120, 90, 0.10);
    --shadow-lg: 0 16px 48px rgba(180, 120, 90, 0.16);
    --shadow-glow: 0 8px 32px var(--warm-accent-glow);
    --radius-sm: 10px;
    --radius: 18px;
    --radius-lg: 24px;
    --radius-pill: 50px;
    --font-scale: 1;
    --font-base: calc(16px * var(--font-scale));
    --font-stack: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "PingFang SC", "Hiragino Sans GB", "Microsoft YaHei", "Segoe UI", Roboto, sans-serif;
    --mono-stack: "SF Mono", "JetBrains Mono", "Fira Code", Consolas, monospace;
    --header-grad: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff9a76 0%, #e8785a 45%, #d45a3a 100%);
    --ease: cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
    --ease-bounce: cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1);
    }
    html { font-size: var(--font-base); scroll-behavior: smooth; }
    body {
    font-family: var(--font-stack);
    background: var(--warm-bg);
    background-image:
    radial-gradient(circle at 12% 8%, rgba(232, 120, 90, 0.08) 0%, transparent 35%),
    radial-gradient(circle at 88% 92%, rgba(244, 162, 97, 0.07) 0%, transparent 38%);
    background-attachment: fixed;
    color: var(--text-primary);
    line-height: 1.75;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    min-height: 100vh;
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
    }
    /* ====== Header ====== */
    .header {
    position: relative;
    background: var(--header-grad);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 56px 20px 64px;
    text-align: center;
    overflow: hidden;
    isolation: isolate;
    }
    .header::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    inset: -50%;
    background-image:
    radial-gradient(circle at 20% 30%, rgba(255,255,255,0.18) 0, transparent 2px),
    radial-gradient(circle at 70% 60%, rgba(255,255,255,0.12) 0, transparent 2px),
    radial-gradient(circle at 40% 80%, rgba(255,255,255,0.15) 0, transparent 2px);
    background-size: 60px 60px, 80px 80px, 50px 50px;
    animation: drift 30s linear infinite;
    z-index: -1;
    }
    .header::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    left: 0; right: 0; bottom: -1px;
    height: 40px;
    background: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent, var(--warm-bg));
    z-index: 1;
    }
    @keyframes drift {
    from { transform: translate(0,0); }
    to { transform: translate(-60px, -60px); }
    }
    .header-top {
    position: absolute;
    top: 16px; left: 0; right: 0;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 0 20px;
    z-index: 3;
    }
    .trae-badge {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.18);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 6px 14px;
    border-radius: var(--radius-pill);
    font-size: 0.72em;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.3px;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 6px;
    }
    .font-toggle {
    display: flex;
    gap: 4px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.18);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
    border-radius: var(--radius-pill);
    padding: 4px;
    }
    .font-toggle button {
    background: transparent;
    border: none;
    color: #fff;
    cursor: pointer;
    padding: 4px 10px;
    border-radius: var(--radius-pill);
    font-weight: 700;
    transition: all 0.25s var(--ease);
    line-height: 1;
    }
    .font-toggle button:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); }
    .font-toggle button.active {
    background: #fff;
    color: var(--warm-accent-deep);
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
    }
    .font-toggle .fs-a { font-size: 0.85em; }
    .font-toggle .fs-ap { font-size: 1em; }
    .font-toggle .fs-app { font-size: 1.15em; }
    .header-inner { position: relative; z-index: 2; max-width: 720px; margin: 0 auto; }
    .app-icon {
    width: 76px; height: 76px;
    margin: 0 auto 16px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.22);
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.35);
    border-radius: 22px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 2.4em;
    box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
    animation: float 4s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    @keyframes float {
    0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); }
    50% { transform: translateY(-6px); }
    }
    .header h1 {
    font-size: 2.6em;
    font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    text-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
    }
    .header h1 .en {
    display: block;
    font-size: 0.32em;
    font-weight: 500;
    opacity: 0.85;
    letter-spacing: 4px;
    margin-top: 6px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    }
    .header p {
    font-size: 1.1em;
    opacity: 0.96;
    max-width: 520px;
    margin: 12px auto 0;
    line-height: 1.7;
    }
    /* ====== Stats Bar ====== */
    .stats-bar {
    background: var(--warm-card-glass);
    backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
    border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    margin: -40px auto 0;
    max-width: 880px;
    padding: 24px 28px;
    box-shadow: var(--shadow);
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(170px, 1fr));
    gap: 16px;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 5;
    }
    .stat-item {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 10px 8px;
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    transition: all 0.3s var(--ease);
    cursor: default;
    }
    .stat-item:hover {
    background: var(--warm-accent-light);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    }
    .stat-icon { font-size: 1.4em; margin-bottom: 4px; display: block; }
    .stat-num {
    font-size: 1.7em;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--warm-accent);
    line-height: 1.1;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--warm-accent), var(--warm-accent-deep));
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    }
    .stat-label {
    font-size: 0.82em;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    margin-top: 4px;
    }
    /* ====== Main App ====== */
    .app-container {
    max-width: 980px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 32px 20px 80px;
    }
    /* ====== Tabs ====== */
    .tab-nav {
    display: flex;
    gap: 8px;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    padding: 6px;
    background: var(--warm-card-glass);
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    border-radius: var(--radius-pill);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
    border: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
    }
    .tab-btn {
    flex: 1 1 auto;
    min-width: 92px;
    padding: 10px 16px;
    border: none;
    background: transparent;
    border-radius: var(--radius-pill);
    cursor: pointer;
    font-size: 0.92em;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    transition: all 0.35s var(--ease-bounce);
    font-weight: 600;
    font-family: inherit;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 6px;
    white-space: nowrap;
    }
    .tab-btn .tab-icon { font-size: 1.1em; }
    .tab-btn:hover { color: var(--warm-accent); background: var(--warm-accent-light); }
    .tab-btn.active {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--warm-accent) 0%, var(--warm-accent-deep) 100%);
    color: #fff;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 18px var(--warm-accent-glow);
    transform: translateY(-1px);
    }
    .tab-panel { display: none; animation: fadeInUp 0.45s var(--ease); }
    .tab-panel.active { display: block; }
    @keyframes fadeInUp {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(12px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: none; }
    }
    @keyframes fadeIn { from { opacity: 0; } to { opacity: 1; } }
    @keyframes scaleIn {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.96); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: none; }
    }
    /* ====== Cards ====== */
    .card {
    background: var(--warm-card-glass);
    backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
    border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    padding: 28px;
    box-shadow: var(--shadow);
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    transition: transform 0.3s var(--ease), box-shadow 0.3s var(--ease);
    }
    .card:hover { box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg); }
    .card h2 {
    font-size: 1.3em;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    color: var(--text-primary);
    }
    .card h2 .icon {
    font-size: 1.3em;
    width: 38px; height: 38px;
    background: var(--warm-accent-light);
    border-radius: 12px;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    }
    .card-desc {
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    margin-bottom: 18px;
    font-size: 0.96em;
    line-height: 1.7;
    }
    /* ====== Search Box ====== */
    .search-box {
    display: flex;
    gap: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    }
    .search-box input {
    flex: 1;
    padding: 14px 22px;
    border: 2px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--radius-pill);
    font-size: 1.05em;
    outline: none;
    transition: all 0.3s var(--ease);
    background: #fff;
    font-family: inherit;
    color: var(--text-primary);
    }
    .search-box input:focus {
    border-color: var(--warm-accent);
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px var(--warm-accent-glow);
    }
    .btn-primary {
    padding: 14px 28px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--warm-accent) 0%, var(--warm-accent-deep) 100%);
    color: #fff;
    border: none;
    border-radius: var(--radius-pill);
    font-size: 1em;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-family: inherit;
    transition: all 0.25s var(--ease);
    box-shadow: 0 6px 16px var(--warm-accent-glow);
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 6px;
    }
    .btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 10px 24px var(--warm-accent-glow); }
    .btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); }
    /* ====== Drug Tags ====== */
    .drug-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 20px; }
    .drug-tag {
    padding: 8px 16px;
    background: var(--warm-accent-light);
    color: var(--warm-accent-deep);
    border-radius: var(--radius-pill);
    cursor: pointer;
    font-size: 0.9em;
    border: 2px solid transparent;
    transition: all 0.25s var(--ease);
    font-weight: 500;
    user-select: none;
    }
    .drug-tag:hover {
    border-color: var(--warm-accent);
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    }
    .drug-tag.selected {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--warm-accent), var(--warm-accent-deep));
    color: #fff;
    border-color: transparent;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 12px var(--warm-accent-glow);
    }
    /* ====== Result Box ====== */
    .result-box {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fff8f5 0%, #fff 100%);
    border: 1px solid var(--warm-accent-light);
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    padding: 24px;
    margin-top: 16px;
    display: none;
    position: relative;
    }
    .result-box.show { display: block; animation: scaleIn 0.45s var(--ease); }
    .result-box .drug-header {
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-start;
    justify-content: space-between;
    gap: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
    padding-bottom: 16px;
    border-bottom: 1px dashed var(--border);
    }
    .result-box .drug-name {
    font-size: 1.55em;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--warm-accent-deep);
    margin-bottom: 4px;
    }
    .result-box .drug-category {
    font-size: 0.85em;
    color: var(--text-light);
    }
    .fav-btn {
    background: var(--warm-card);
    border: 2px solid var(--border);
    width: 42px; height: 42px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-size: 1.2em;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    transition: all 0.3s var(--ease-bounce);
    flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .fav-btn:hover { transform: scale(1.15); border-color: var(--warm-accent); }
    .fav-btn.active {
    background: #fff3cd;
    border-color: var(--warning);
    animation: pop 0.4s var(--ease-bounce);
    }
    @keyframes pop {
    0% { transform: scale(1); }
    50% { transform: scale(1.35); }
    100% { transform: scale(1); }
    }
    .result-section {
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    padding: 14px 16px;
    background: #fff;
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    border-left: 3px solid var(--warm-accent-light);
    transition: border-color 0.3s;
    }
    .result-section:hover { border-left-color: var(--warm-accent); }
    .result-section h3 {
    font-size: 0.82em;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.6px;
    font-weight: 700;
    }
    .result-section p {
    font-size: 1.04em;
    line-height: 1.85;
    color: var(--text-primary);
    }
    .highlight {
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 55%, #ffe08a 55%);
    padding: 0 4px;
    font-weight: 700;
    border-radius: 2px;
    }
    /* ====== Interaction Result ====== */
    .interaction-item {
    padding: 16px 18px;
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-start;
    gap: 14px;
    animation: fadeInUp 0.4s var(--ease);
    border: 1px solid transparent;
    }
    .interaction-item.safe { background: var(--success-bg); border-left: 4px solid var(--success); }
    .interaction-item.warning { background: var(--warning-bg); border-left: 4px solid var(--warning); }
    .interaction-item.danger {
    background: var(--danger-bg);
    border-left: 4px solid var(--danger);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(201, 93, 78, 0.15);
    }
    .interaction-icon { font-size: 1.7em; flex-shrink: 0; line-height: 1; }
    .interaction-content h4 { font-size: 1.02em; margin-bottom: 4px; font-weight: 700; }
    .interaction-content p { font-size: 0.94em; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.7; }
    /* ====== Chat History ====== */
    .chat-messages {
    max-height: 420px;
    overflow-y: auto;
    padding: 4px;
    }
    .chat-msg {
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    padding: 12px 16px;
    border-radius: 16px;
    max-width: 86%;
    animation: fadeInUp 0.35s var(--ease);
    line-height: 1.7;
    word-wrap: break-word;
    }
    .chat-msg.user {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--warm-accent), var(--warm-accent-deep));
    color: #fff;
    margin-left: auto;
    border-bottom-right-radius: 4px;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 12px var(--warm-accent-glow);
    }
    .chat-msg.ai {
    background: #fff;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-bottom-left-radius: 4px;
    }
    .chat-msg .msg-role {
    font-size: 0.72em;
    opacity: 0.7;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
    font-weight: 600;
    }
    .chat-msg .msg-time {
    font-size: 0.7em;
    opacity: 0.6;
    margin-top: 4px;
    text-align: right;
    }
    /* ====== MCP Panel ====== */
    .mcp-panel {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0; right: -440px;
    width: 420px;
    max-width: 100%;
    height: 100vh;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1a1512 0%, #221b16 100%);
    color: #c9bfb5;
    z-index: 200;
    transition: right 0.45s var(--ease);
    overflow-y: auto;
    font-family: var(--mono-stack);
    font-size: 0.82em;
    box-shadow: -16px 0 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
    }
    .mcp-panel.open { right: 0; }
    .mcp-panel-header {
    position: sticky;
    top: 0;
    background: rgba(26, 21, 18, 0.92);
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    padding: 18px 22px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #332a24;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    z-index: 2;
    }
    .mcp-panel-header h3 {
    color: var(--warm-accent);
    font-size: 0.95em;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    }
    .mcp-panel-header .live-dot {
    width: 8px; height: 8px;
    background: var(--success);
    border-radius: 50%;
    animation: pulse 2s infinite;
    box-shadow: 0 0 8px var(--success);
    }
    .mcp-close {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    border: 1px solid #332a24;
    color: #888;
    font-size: 1.1em;
    cursor: pointer;
    padding: 4px 10px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    }
    .mcp-close:hover { color: #fff; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); }
    .mcp-content { padding: 18px 20px 40px; }
    .mcp-empty {
    color: #555;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 60px 0;
    line-height: 2;
    }
    .mcp-empty .empty-icon { font-size: 2.4em; opacity: 0.4; display: block; margin-bottom: 12px; }
    .mcp-step {
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    padding: 14px 16px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
    border-radius: 10px;
    border-left: 3px solid #444;
    animation: slideIn 0.35s var(--ease);
    position: relative;
    }
    .mcp-step::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    left: -3px; top: 0; bottom: 0;
    width: 3px;
    background: inherit;
    border-radius: 3px;
    }
    .mcp-step.tool-call { border-left-color: #5a9ec9; background: rgba(90, 158, 201, 0.06); }
    .mcp-step.tool-result { border-left-color: #5a9e6f; background: rgba(90, 158, 111, 0.06); }
    .mcp-step.thinking { border-left-color: #d4a843; background: rgba(212, 168, 67, 0.06); }
    .mcp-step.system { border-left-color: #a89e95; }
    .mcp-step .step-label {
    font-size: 0.72em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #888;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 6px;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
    }
    .mcp-step .step-time {
    margin-left: auto;
    color: #555;
    font-size: 0.9em;
    }
    .mcp-step code {
    color: #e8d5c4;
    font-size: 0.86em;
    white-space: pre-wrap;
    word-break: break-word;
    line-height: 1.6;
    display: block;
    }
    .mcp-step .tok-key { color: #5a9ec9; }
    .mcp-step .tok-str { color: #a8d4a0; }
    .mcp-step .tok-num { color: #e8a87c; }
    .mcp-step .tok-punc { color: #888; }
    @keyframes slideIn {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(20px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: none; }
    }
    /* ====== MCP Toggle Button ====== */
    .mcp-toggle {
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 24px;
    right: 24px;
    z-index: 150;
    padding: 12px 20px;
    background: #1a1512;
    color: var(--warm-accent);
    border: 1px solid var(--warm-accent);
    border-radius: var(--radius-pill);
    cursor: pointer;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 0.88em;
    transition: all 0.3s var(--ease);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    font-family: inherit;
    box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
    }
    .mcp-toggle:hover {
    background: var(--warm-accent);
    color: #fff;
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 12px 28px var(--warm-accent-glow);
    }
    .mcp-dot {
    width: 8px; height: 8px;
    background: var(--success);
    border-radius: 50%;
    animation: pulse 2s infinite;
    box-shadow: 0 0 8px var(--success);
    }
    @keyframes pulse {
    0%, 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
    50% { opacity: 0.4; transform: scale(0.85); }
    }
    /* ====== SOS Button & Modal ====== */
    .sos-btn {
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 24px;
    left: 24px;
    z-index: 150;
    width: 64px; height: 64px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e74c3c, #c0392b);
    color: #fff;
    border: 3px solid #fff;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-weight: 800;
    font-size: 1.1em;
    box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(231, 76, 60, 0.45);
    transition: all 0.3s var(--ease);
    font-family: inherit;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    animation: sosPulse 2.5s infinite;
    }
    .sos-btn:hover { transform: scale(1.1); }
    @keyframes sosPulse {
    0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(231, 76, 60, 0.45), 0 0 0 0 rgba(231, 76, 60, 0.5); }
    50% { box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(231, 76, 60, 0.45), 0 0 0 16px rgba(231, 76, 60, 0); }
    }
    .modal-overlay {
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background: rgba(45, 36, 32, 0.6);
    backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
    z-index: 300;
    display: none;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 20px;
    animation: fadeIn 0.3s;
    }
    .modal-overlay.show { display: flex; }
    .modal {
    background: #fff;
    border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    max-width: 440px;
    width: 100%;
    padding: 28px;
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
    animation: scaleIn 0.35s var(--ease-bounce);
    max-height: 90vh;
    overflow-y: auto;
    }
    .modal-header {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 18px;
    padding-bottom: 16px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .modal-header .sos-icon {
    width: 48px; height: 48px;
    background: var(--danger-bg);
    color: var(--danger);
    border-radius: 14px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1.6em;
    }
    .modal-header h3 { font-size: 1.25em; }
    .modal-header p { font-size: 0.85em; color: var(--text-secondary); }
    .contact-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 18px; }
    .contact-item {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 14px;
    padding: 14px 16px;
    background: var(--warm-bg);
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    transition: all 0.25s var(--ease);
    cursor: pointer;
    }
    .contact-item:hover {
    border-color: var(--warm-accent);
    transform: translateX(4px);
    background: var(--warm-accent-light);
    }
    .contact-item .c-icon {
    width: 44px; height: 44px;
    border-radius: 12px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1.3em;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .contact-item .c-icon.emergency { background: var(--danger-bg); color: var(--danger); }
    .contact-item .c-icon.family { background: var(--warm-accent-light); color: var(--warm-accent-deep); }
    .contact-item .c-icon.nurse { background: var(--info-bg); color: var(--info); }
    .contact-item .c-info { flex: 1; }
    .contact-item .c-name { font-weight: 700; font-size: 1em; }
    .contact-item .c-num { font-size: 0.88em; color: var(--text-secondary); }
    .contact-item .c-action {
    background: var(--warm-accent);
    color: #fff;
    border: none;
    padding: 8px 14px;
    border-radius: var(--radius-pill);
    font-size: 0.85em;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-family: inherit;
    }
    .modal-close {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 12px;
    background: var(--border-soft);
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    border: none;
    border-radius: var(--radius-pill);
    cursor: pointer;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-family: inherit;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    }
    .modal-close:hover { background: var(--border); }
    /* ====== Voice Mode ====== */
    .voice-btn {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 22px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--warm-accent) 0%, var(--warm-accent-deep) 100%);
    color: #fff;
    border: none;
    border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    font-size: 1.1em;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-family: inherit;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 10px;
    transition: all 0.3s var(--ease);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 24px var(--warm-accent-glow);
    }
    .voice-btn:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 12px 32px var(--warm-accent-glow); }
    .voice-btn.listening {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--danger) 0%, #a03020 100%);
    animation: voicePulse 1.2s infinite;
    }
    @keyframes voicePulse {
    0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(201, 93, 78, 0.4), 0 0 0 0 rgba(201, 93, 78, 0.5); }
    50% { box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(201, 93, 78, 0.4), 0 0 0 20px rgba(201, 93, 78, 0); }
    }
    .voice-mic-icon { font-size: 1.5em; }
    /* ====== Reminder ====== */
    .reminder-item {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 14px;
    padding: 16px;
    background: #fff;
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    transition: all 0.25s var(--ease);
    }
    .reminder-item:hover { box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); transform: translateX(2px); }
    .reminder-check {
    width: 30px; height: 30px;
    border: 2px solid var(--warm-accent);
    border-radius: 50%;
    cursor: pointer;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    transition: all 0.3s var(--ease-bounce);
    color: transparent;
    font-size: 0.9em;
    font-weight: 700;
    }
    .reminder-check:hover { background: var(--warm-accent-light); }
    .reminder-check.done {
    background: var(--success);
    border-color: var(--success);
    color: #fff;
    animation: pop 0.4s var(--ease-bounce);
    }
    .reminder-time {
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--warm-accent-deep);
    min-width: 64px;
    font-size: 1.05em;
    font-family: var(--mono-stack);
    }
    .reminder-info { flex: 1; }
    .reminder-info .drug { font-weight: 700; }
    .reminder-info .dose { font-size: 0.85em; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-top: 2px; }
    .reminder-done-text { text-decoration: line-through; color: var(--text-light); }
    .reminder-delete {
    background: transparent;
    border: none;
    color: var(--text-light);
    cursor: pointer;
    font-size: 1.1em;
    padding: 4px 8px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    }
    .reminder-delete:hover { color: var(--danger); background: var(--danger-bg); }
    /* ====== Photo Recognition ====== */
    .photo-zone {
    border: 2px dashed var(--warm-accent);
    border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    padding: 40px 20px;
    text-align: center;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.3s var(--ease);
    background: var(--warm-accent-light);
    background-image: repeating-linear-gradient(45deg, transparent, transparent 12px, rgba(232,120,90,0.04) 12px, rgba(232,120,90,0.04) 24px);
    }
    .photo-zone:hover {
    background-color: #fde0d2;
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    }
    .photo-zone .photo-icon { font-size: 3em; display: block; margin-bottom: 12px; }
    .photo-zone .photo-title { font-size: 1.15em; font-weight: 700; color: var(--warm-accent-deep); margin-bottom: 6px; }
    .photo-zone .photo-hint { font-size: 0.9em; color: var(--text-secondary); }
    .photo-preview {
    margin-top: 18px;
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    overflow: hidden;
    display: none;
    background: #fff;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .photo-preview.show { display: block; animation: scaleIn 0.4s var(--ease); }
    .photo-preview img { width: 100%; max-height: 280px; object-fit: contain; display: block; background: #f5f0eb; }
    .ocr-progress {
    margin-top: 18px;
    display: none;
    }
    .ocr-progress.show { display: block; animation: fadeIn 0.3s; }
    .ocr-step {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
    padding: 10px 14px;
    background: #fff;
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    opacity: 0.4;
    transition: opacity 0.4s, transform 0.4s;
    border-left: 3px solid var(--border);
    }
    .ocr-step.active { opacity: 1; border-left-color: var(--warm-accent); transform: translateX(4px); }
    .ocr-step.done { opacity: 1; border-left-color: var(--success); }
    .ocr-step .ocr-icon { font-size: 1.2em; }
    .ocr-step .ocr-text { flex: 1; font-size: 0.92em; }
    .ocr-step .ocr-status { font-size: 0.8em; color: var(--text-light); }
    .ocr-step.done .ocr-status { color: var(--success); }
    .ocr-spinner {
    width: 14px; height: 14px;
    border: 2px solid var(--border);
    border-top-color: var(--warm-accent);
    border-radius: 50%;
    animation: spin 0.8s linear infinite;
    display: none;
    }
    .ocr-step.active .ocr-spinner { display: inline-block; }
    @keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }
    View remainder of file in raw view
